reviews.title: Basic accommodation is
reviews.text:
This hotel satisfied one and disappoint another. I faced with too many disappointing points therefore the not so good review. Let me elaborate.

When I check in (solo traveller), I realise they are not good/concern enough to give a queen bed but instead a twin single bed room. Then it was on 19th floor I thought well at least they care enough to give a high floor. Then on 3rd day (BTW I stayed 6 nights) I saw from outside 19 and 20th floor has no balcony all other floors below has a balcony. Mind me how bad they have treat me. This Is a non peak period they definitely don't have to squeeze people into that room. BTW this is the first time I stay in a 4* hotel with half window and not ceiling to floor as expected.

The next big disappointment is the gym. If this facility is a priority forget about this place. It squeeze a threadmill, a multifunction and a small 6-pair dumbell rack in a room space. It's like 2* gym in a 4* hotel. I over trust the Mercure name thinking the facility won't be that way off. 

Third bad experience is with the housekeeping. I told them I not ready for them yet, telling them to come back as I would be eaving soon. Instead of coming in later when I am off, they rang door bell like it's time up, they have to do their job already. This happened another that cleaner gave me a face n stare when I said I still have thing to do in the room. My goodness they kind of expect guests must suit their time or follow roster for cleaning??

The saving grace is the reception or guest officer, Thi who at least able to communicate well and was assuring within her capacity.

To be fair, aside from all these inconsideration and bad servicces, if one just look for a basic clean resting room I would recommend this for peace of mind.
reviews.room_type: Classic Room, City View - 2 Single Beds

reviews.title: My worst hotel experience in Vietnam
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: One garbage can. You had to walk to the bathroom everytime you had trash to throw away. Made coffee, walk to bathroom, drank water walk to bathroom. Laundry availability was unavailable. Staff did not speak any English. I was not told that the drinks in the fridge were not free

reviews.title: A slightly disappointing accommodation.
reviews.text: It wasn't bad for the price, but there were some disappointing aspects, so I wanted to leave a review. Overall, the room condition was good, but due to a reservation error, only one person per room could use breakfast. I thought the extra cost for breakfast upon check-in was a bit high, so I hesitated, and after trying the breakfast on the first day, I was quite disappointed. I'm glad I decided not to add it. One of the rooms was upgraded and had a great sea view, and there were plenty of places to eat and things to enjoy nearby, so the location seems good. I chose this place because I wanted to use the indoor swimming pool, but it seems hard to give a strong recommendation.
reviews.response:
Dear valuable guest,
Thank you for sharing your feedback. We are glad you liked the room condition, the sea view upgrade, and the location near food and entertainment. We are sorry about the breakfast and reservation issue, and we will work to improve this service. We also note your comment about the indoor pool. Your review helps us to make our accommodation better for future guests.
Warm regards,

Mercure Nha Trang Beach Team
reviews.room_type: Classic Room, City View - 2 Single Beds

reviews.title: Nice hotel
reviews.positives: Breakfast OK, not lots of choices
reviews.negatives: Ac in breakfast room is not enough

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: The location is great, classic  beautiful style if anyone like. But i can’t sleep well, i always dream nightmare, a little noise outside . That’s ok.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for sharing your feedback. We are happy to know you liked our location and the classic style of the hotel.

We are sorry to hear that you could not sleep well and that there was some outside noise. Your feedback is important for us to improve the guest experience.

We hope to have the chance to welcome you back for a more comfortable stay.

Best regards,
Tu Nguyen 

Front Office Manager
reviews.room_type: Classic Room, City View - 2 Single Beds

reviews.title: Excellent location but poor wifi and some pushy staff
reviews.positives: The location is right across from the beach.  The receptionist upgraded our room to a larger room on the top floor which was a generous move from them.  The views from our corner room included both the beach and beach-side road.
reviews.negatives:
The breakfast buffet ends at 9:30 AM and the staff come around at 9:25 AM telling everyone to leave, which I thought was inflexible and inconsiderate.  The staff should let people who are eating their breakfast finish even if they go a little past 9:30 AM.

The wifi on the top floor frequently disconnected.  Loud karaoke singing could be clearly heard even on the 20th floor.  The bathtub is high and difficult to step into, even for tall people.

After we checked out, the receptionist asked for my review of the hotel.  I told her the problem with the breakfast and wifi but she did not write anything down.  Instead, she thanked me for my feedback and asked me to immediately leave a 5 star review on Google, which I declined.  Hotel staff shouldn't hustle their guests for good reviews.

reviews.title: New experience
reviews.text: On this trip to Nha Trang, I chose a new hotel with special rates from Agoda. It was wonderful... I will continue to use Agoda's services for my upcoming trips.
reviews.response:
Kính gửi Quý khách,

Cảm ơn Quý khách đã tin tưởng lựa chọn khách sạn chúng tôi cho kỳ nghỉ tại Nha Trang và chia sẻ cảm nhận tích cực. Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết rằng Quý khách đã có trải nghiệm tuyệt vời và hài lòng với kỳ nghỉ.

Chúng tôi hy vọng sẽ tiếp tục được chào đón Quý khách trong những chuyến đi sắp tới.

Trân trọng,
Tu Nguyen 

Front Office Manager
reviews.room_type: Classic Room, City View - 2 Single Beds

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Excellent view and great location
reviews.negatives: Bring earplugs if you have an ocean view room. There’s a lot of traffic on the street below.

reviews.title: Two Classic City View Rooms
reviews.text: Nicely renovated hotel opposite beach, walking distance to the Sailing Club. There was noise from a disco at rear on the weekend but was bearable. Breakfast was ok, a bit cramped but a good selection. Indoor pool and spa were freezing. We had a noise issue in room when spa was on two floors up so could be a problem if it is used often. Sewage smell in lifts was strong. 4☆
reviews.response:
Dear valuable guest, 

Thank you very much for your detailed feedback. We are glad that you enjoyed our renovated hotel, the location near the beach and Sailing Club, and the breakfast selection. We are sorry to hear about the noise from the disco, the cold pool and spa, the sound issue in your room, and the smell in the lifts. Please accept our sincere apologies.

Your comments are very important to us, and we will check these points carefully to improve our service. We hope to welcome you again and provide you with a more comfortable stay.

Warm regards,
Mercure Nha Trang Beach Team
reviews.room_type: Classic Room, City View - 2 Single Beds

reviews.title: Besides the moldy blinds, I like the hotel & location. Overall I would recommend this hotel.
reviews.positives: The property is clean, the staff are very attentive & courteous, and the breakfast buffet offered a wide variety of food.
reviews.negatives: The shades/blinds to cover the glass bathroom walls are dirty with mildew/mold. I didn’t like taking a shower next to it. We booked 2 rooms & the problem was in both bathrooms.

reviews.title: A nice property in Nha Trang
reviews.text: You can't beat the location, cleanliness and comfort of Accor hotel properties but there is a small improvement needed, the elevators are very stuffy and smelly sometimes.  The staff could be a bit more attentive and friendly.
reviews.response:
Dear valuable guest, 
Thank you for sharing your feedback with us. We are pleased to know that you enjoyed our location, cleanliness, and comfort. We also appreciate your comments about the elevators and staff service. Your suggestions are very valuable, and we will work on improving these areas to make your future stays more pleasant.

We hope to welcome you again in Nha Trang.

Warm regards,
Mercure Nha Trang Beach Team

reviews.title: Definitely will Return to Mercure when we’re in Nha Trang!
reviews.text: Lovely Staff, Super Sweet & accommodating! We will definitely return to this establishment! The room is adorable & the bathroom is different>the way the shower is built & also provides a peep show window,LOL! But that window does have shades for privacy! Overall, we’ll recommend this establishment & come back there again:)

We look forward to seeing you again soon!
Warm regards,

Mercure Nha Trang Beach Team

Breakfast is worth it mostly Vietnamese style cooking. Coffee was good, lotsa fruits

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Great beachfront hotel in a perfect location.
Mercure has a beautiful beachfront right in front of the hotel and is close to everything — restaurants, shops, and attractions are all within easy reach. The hotel is very clean and well maintained, with comfortable rooms and common areas. What really stands out is the young staff — friendly, energetic, and always helpful. Overall, a very clean hotel with a great location and atmosphere. Highly recommended.
reviews.response:
Dear valuable guest,   
Thank you very much for sharing your wonderful review. We are delighted to know that you enjoyed our clean and comfortable hotel, the perfect beachfront location, and the atmosphere around us. It makes us very happy that our young and energetic staff could make your stay even more enjoyable. Your kind words are a great motivation for our team to keep improving every day. We truly appreciate your recommendation and look forward to welcoming you back for another great experience soon.
Warm regards,

Mercure Nha Trang Beach Team

Warm regards,

Mercure Nha Trang Beach Team

J’ai apprécié les bouteilles d’eau en verre ainsi que la coiffeuse qui est jolie et utile. La télé est de bonne taille, c’est agréable à regarder quand le temps ne nous permet pas de sortir. Les personnels sont gentils et agréables.
reviews.negatives: Les petits déjeuners ne sont pas variés. On mange toujours la même chose et il n’y a de choix pour les jus de fruits frais. Les fenêtres mal isolées

reviews.title: Wir sind sehr zufrieden
reviews.positives:
Wir sind nach einer langen Busreise schon um 8 Uhr angereist und dürfen dann um 10 Uhr schon einchecken. Das hat uns sehr gefreut. Das Personal war sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit. Das Bett war sehr bequem und kuschelig. Wir haben sehr gut geschlafen.
Das Frühstück ist gut und es gibt hauptsächlich warmes asiatisches Essen
reviews.negatives: Die Rollos in der Dusche könnten ausgetauscht werden, da sie schimmelig sind und als Verbesserungsvorschlag sollten die Rollos außen angebracht werden, dann kann es nicht passieren, dass sie nass werden und schimmeln.

reviews.title: 깨끗하고 좋습니다
reviews.text: 새로 리모델링해서 깨끗하네요
reviews.response:
Dear valuable guest, 
Thank you for your feedback! We’re glad you liked the clean and fresh look. The recent remodeling was done to make everything more comfortable and pleasant for our guests.
We hope to welcome you again soon!
Best regards,
Tu Nguyen

Front Office Manager
reviews.room_type: Classic Superior Room, Ideal For Family - 1 Double Bed & 2 Single Beds

reviews.title: Im Hinblick auf Preis/ Leistung war der Aufenthalt akzeptabel
reviews.positives: Lage an der Strandpromenade im ruhigeren Strandabschnitt, Meerblick aus dem Zimmer
reviews.negatives: etwas in die Jahre gekommen, Schimmel an den Vorhängen, kein Roomservice trotz Speisekarte, Toilettenpapier mussten wir 2x nachbestellen, Reparatur Toilette trotz Aufforderung nicht erfolgt, Personal erste Tage sehr neutral (Dienst nach Vorschrift) danach die andere Schicht war wesentlich freundlicher, Frühstück unterdurchschnittlich für Vietnam, mitunter starke Gerüche in Gang und Fahrstuhl, starker Anteil russisches Klientel

Warm regards,
Mercure Nha Trang Beach Team

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
Schöne Sicht auf einen ruhigen Teil des Strandes.
Insgesamt ein angenehmes, gepflegtes Ambiente. 
Der Poolbereich hat ruhige, gut belüftete Ecken, so dass man auch mal am Computer arbeiten kann

reviews.title: Tolle Oase zum abschalten!
reviews.positives:
Sehr schönes Haus mit allen Unannehmlichkeiten!
Tolle Lage, toller Blick und extrem guter Frühstück

reviews.title: Super!!!
reviews.positives:
Super Hotel, sehr gute Lage, schöne Zimmer und ein sehr gutes Frühstücksbuffet. 
Preis/Leistung wirklich hervorragend, ich war im MerPerle sehr zufrieden und würde jederzeit wieder dort übernachten!

reviews.title: Wir empfehlen dieses Hotel zu 100%
reviews.positives: Wir haben dieses Hotel erst für eine Woche gebucht, aber dann hat uns Alles so gefallen, dass wir ein anderes Hotel storniert haben und 2 weitere Wochen geblieben sind. Für fast alle Touristen in Vietnam ist ein Überqueren der Straße, wegen des Verkehrs, ein gewaltiges Problem. Dieses Hotel steht jedoch so gut , dass man die Straße gut überqueren kann; das Meer ist sehr nah; ein schöner Park ist fast vor der Tür und zum Zentrum ist es ein 10-minütiger Fußweg, Das Zimmer wird täglich gereinigt und täglich werden Kaffee , Wasser und Tee neu aufgefüllt. Das Personal ist sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit. Das Frühstück ist sehr vielseitig und sehr lecker. Wir wollen uns beim Manager und dem Personal von der Rezeption sehr bedanken, dass wir, ohne Zuzahlung, sogar ein noch besseres Zimmer bekommen haben.
reviews.negatives: Uns hat alles gefallen

reviews.title: Jederzeit wieder gerne
reviews.positives: Enthusiastisches Personal extrem Freundlich und Zuvorkommend
reviews.negatives: Nicht 100% sauber

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Wir sind unmittelbar am Strand. Frühstück war vielfaltig. Gegend sehr zentral in Nha Trang.
